title: Thin Air Lava Disabler
description: A datapack that disables suffocation near lava in the thin air mod.
body:
# Thin Air Lava Disabler
### A datapack that disables suffocation near lava with the [Thin Air](https://modrinth.com/mod/thin-air) mod. Not only is it quite unrealistic, but it's also annyoing when exploring the nether.
